components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: chacha20
components.description: The ChaCha20 stream cipher (RFC 8439) implemented in pure Rust using traits from the RustCrypto `cipher` crate, with optional architecture-specific hardware acceleration (AVX2, SSE2). Additionally provides the ChaCha8, ChaCha12, XChaCha20, XChaCha12 and XChaCha8 stream ciphers, and also optional rand_core-compatible RNGs based on those ciphers.

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: chacha20poly1305

Also contains implementations of the XChaCha20Poly1305 extended nonce variant of ChaCha20Poly1305, and the reduced-round ChaCha8Poly1305 and ChaCha12Poly1305 lightweight variants.

components.name: zerocopy
components.description: Zerocopy makes zero-cost memory manipulation effortless. We write "unsafe" so you don't have to.

components.author: The RustCrypto Project Developers
components.name: zeroize
components.description: Securely clear secrets from memory with a simple trait built on stable Rust primitives which guarantee memory is zeroed using an operation will not be 'optimized away' by the compiler. Uses a portable pure Rust implementation that works everywhere, even WASM!

components.author: The RustCrypto Project Developers
components.name: zeroize_derive
components.description: Custom derive support for zeroize

components.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
components.name: zmij
components.description: A double-to-string conversion algorithm based on Schubfach and yy
